news.headline: SAMSE Group, in collaboration with GXO, will enhance omnichannel logistics operations.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate dipped to 4.8%, a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. This decrease represents 560,000 individuals finding employment. Additionally, the economy added 300,000 new jobs, bringing the total number of employed individuals to 6.5 million. Wage growth also saw a rise of 2.5%, indicating positive trends in the labor market. This data suggests a gradual improvement in the overall economic conditions, with more people finding jobs and contributing to the workforce.

news.headline: Baker Hughes to release Q4 and full-year 2024 results on Jan 30, 2025, at 5 p.m. EST, with a webcast on Jan 31 at 9:30 a.m. EST.
news.summary: Houston and London, on Dec. 12, 2024, Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR) is set to reveal the performance numbers for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending on Dec. 31, 2024. The announcement will be made through a press release scheduled for 5 p.m. Eastern Time (4 p.m. Central Time) on Thursday, Jan. 30, 2025. Subsequently, a webcast discussing these results is planned for Friday, Jan. 31, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time (8:30 a.m. Central Time).

news.headline: Star Group, L.P. has signed a $68 million deal to acquire a home energy distributor, expecting to close in 45 days.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut on December 12, 2024, Star Group, L.P. revealed plans to acquire a home energy distributor within its current operational area for about $68 million, excluding working capital adjustments. The agreement is expected to be finalized in the next 45 days pending regulatory approval. Further details of the deal were not disclosed. Star Group, L.P., identified by the stock symbol NYSE:SGU, is a prominent player in the home energy distribution and services sector.

news.headline: Bank CEOs optimistic about Trump policies; Bank of America CEO sees gains with new regulations for more aggressive moves as rates decrease.
news.summary: Bank of America's CEO, Brian Moynihan, noted that positive regulatory adjustments are expected to provide companies with confidence to be more assertive as interest rates decrease.

news.headline: OKX Ventures states Web3 social apps are now ready for mass adoption, issued updates on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: In The Bahamas, on December 12, 2024, OKX Ventures, the investment branch of onchain technology giant OKX, released new information. The report indicates that Web3 social applications are now fully prepared for widespread adoption as infrastructure has been updated. OKX Ventures collaborated with various partners to achieve this milestone.

news.headline: Exploring intangible heritage in Shanghai's Minhang District. City attracts foreign tourists; Maqiao Hand-hold Lion Dance featured.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Beijing, it was reported that Shanghai has become a top destination for international tourists looking to immerse themselves in Chinese culture. A virtual tour of Minhang District in Shanghai showcases the allure of intangible cultural heritage. Particularly, the Maqiao Hand-hold Lion Dance is highlighted, which involves a group of performers showcasing their skills...

news.headline: Restaurant365 survey finds labor & sales issues as top challenges for 2025. Operators plan investments in sales/marketing and employee recruitment.
news.summary: The latest yearly analysis from R365 demonstrates that restaurant operators are intending to allocate funds towards enhancing sales and marketing strategies, as well as prioritizing the recruitment and retention of employees. The report was revealed by Restaurant365, a prominent all-in-one platform for restaurant management, based in Irvine, California. This information was disclosed on December 12, 2024, through a press release.

news.headline: Secured Overnight Financing Rate 4.62% December 11 vs 4.64% December 10.
TIME names Donald Trump as 2024 Person of the Year. President-elect honored in cover photo taken at Mar-a-Lago, Nov 25.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 12, 2024, TIME magazine has selected President-elect Donald Trump as the TIME Person of the Year for 2024, according to PRNewswire. The cover features a portrait of Trump taken at Mar-a-Lago on November 25 by renowned photographer Platon. The news has garnered significant attention, with people encouraged to visit time.com/poy for further details and to view the cover. The recognition marks a significant moment for Trump, receiving the accolade amid his transition to assuming the presidency.

news.headline: CloneOps.ai uses AI to revolutionize phone operations, enhancing efficiency and scalability. Virtual assistants lead the way.
news.summary: Cutting-edge AI technology has revolutionized phone operations, leading to significant efficiencies and reshaping traditional communication methods. Based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., the software, CloneOps.ai virtual assistants, harness advanced artificial intelligence to enhance operations. This innovation promises to bring about vast improvements in communication models and is set to transform the industry. The development, unveiled on Dec. 12, 2024, signals a groundbreaking shift in how businesses handle phone interactions.

news.headline: Global Crossing Airlines forms Asia Pacific venture with ATB Aviation Australia, establishing new airline in Melbourne.
news.summary: Miami-based Global Crossing Airlines Group, Inc. (trading under symbols Cboe CA: JET and JET.B, and OTCQB: JETMF) revealed their partnership with ATB Aviation Australia to form a new airline based in Melbourne, Australia. The joint venture marks a significant move for GlobalX, known as the Nation's rapidly expanding charter airline. The collaboration with ATB Aviation sets the stage for the establishment of the new airline's headquarters in Melbourne, Australia. This initiative reflects GlobalX's commitment to strengthening its presence and operations internationally.

news.headline: SC denies Nvidia's motion to dismiss crypto lawsuit. Company wanted the trial court's dismissal affirmed. Nvidia voiced its preference.
news.summary: Nvidia expressed that they would have favored a ruling on the substance upholding the trial court's dismissal of the case, as stated to Decrypt.

news.headline: Kenny G overcame critics to reach top of charts with his saxophone music, starting around age 10.
news.summary: At the age of 10, Kenneth Bruce Gorelick, also known as Kenny G, had a pivotal moment that paved the way for his success in the music industry. This event has been crucial in propelling him to the top of the charts and surpassing the critics' expectations.

news.headline: Google stock hit a new high on Dec. 11 after unveiling Gemini 2.0 and quantum-computing chip, prompting purchase speculation.
news.summary: On December 11th, the stock of Google surged to a record peak as it surpassed an entry threshold, driven by the introduction of a cutting-edge quantum-computing chip and the launch of Gemini 2.0. The stock's performance has sparked discussions about whether it presents a favorable investment opportunity in light of these developments. This news has prompted speculation on the potential growth prospects for Google.

news.headline: Neptune Software's SAP-native app dev platform brings enterprise innovation, versatile and future-proof solution. Oslo, Norway, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: Neptune DXP, a versatile and future-proof solution for enterprise app development, is gaining traction in the market. Developed by Neptune Software in Oslo, Norway, this platform is a leading low-code app development tool. Specifically designed for SAP systems, it aims to optimize business processes. The platform's effectiveness has been highlighted in recent news, dated December 12, 2024. Neptune DXP is being recognized for its ability to drive efficiency and innovation in enterprises. With the increasing demand for agile app development solutions, Neptune DXP stands out as a reliable option for organizations looking to streamline their operations.

news.headline: Windstream subsidiary to offer $1.0 billion in senior notes due 2031, exempt from registration.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas, Windstream Services, LLC ("Services") and Windstream Escrow Finance Corp. ("Escrow"), both subsidiaries of Windstream Holdings II, LLC, have initiated an offering of $1.0 billion aggregate principal amount of 8.250% senior first lien notes due 2031 (the "Additional Notes"). This private offering, exempt from registration under the Securities Act, involves the Co-Issuers, including Services and Escrow.

news.headline: China plans to increase economic stimulus measures by borrowing more and slashing interest rates to boost growth numbers.
news.summary: During a recent meeting to establish the economic policy agenda of the country, China's leadership announced plans to increase borrowing and reduce interest rates. This strategy aims to stimulate growth in the economy.

news.headline: Jacobs wins US Army Corps contract for Northwestern US, Alaska, and Hawaii for architecture and engineering projects.
news.summary: Jacobs, a global company listed on the NYSE as J, has secured a significant contract from the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (USACE) Omaha District on December 12, 2024. This contract involves providing architectural and engineering services for environmental and facilities design projects to enhance the sustainability and resilience of communities. This partnership aims to create cleaner and more robust infrastructures within these regions. The exact financial details of the contract were not explicitly stated in the provided information.

news.headline: Varicent introduces GenAI Assistants to boost revenue growth and sales planning, targeting at-risk accounts.
news.summary: Varicent's GenAI Assistants, developed in Toronto, are set to transform sales planning by detecting endangered accounts and pinpointing chances for revenue growth.

news.headline: Zhangzhou Pien Tze Huang Pharmaceutical Co. works to expand TCM influence globally, focusing on Southeast Asia and Europe.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Zhangzhou Pien Tze Huang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., a company rooted in Fujian and specializing in traditional Chinese medicine (TCM), is actively working towards broadening its global presence. The company is focusing on growing its market reach internationally, with a particular emphasis on regions like Southeast Asia and Europe. By doing so, Zhangzhou Pien Tze Huang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. aims to elevate the prominence of TCM in these areas.

news.headline: Fintech company XTM to receive $10 million investment from Pateno Payments for 51% of equity.
news.summary: A fintech company, XTM Inc., known for its payment solutions like Earned Wage Access (EWA) via the AnyDay™ platform, recently revealed the signing of a non-binding Letter of Intent with Pateno Payments Inc. on December 11, 2024. The agreement involves Pateno acquiring 51% equity in XTM in exchange for a $10 million cash injection into XTM. This move marks a strategic development in the financial landscape, bringing notable advancements to both companies involved.

news.headline: Chainlink (CRYPTO: LINK) price soars 22% to $27.80, hitting $17.4 billion market cap. Analysts predict bullish future.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency Chainlink (LINK) has experienced a significant surge of 22% within just 24 hours, leading to an impressive month-over-month performance of 93%. Its current price stands at $27.80, with a market capitalization of $17.4 billion. In the same period, Avalanche (AVAX) saw a 9.9% increase, priced at $49.86 with a market cap of $20.4 billion, while TRON (TRX) experienced an 8.2% gain, valued at $0.2963 and a market cap of $25.6 billion.Experienced cryptocurrency traders have analyzed the market and shared their insights. Altcoin Sherpa recommends targeting $25 for short-term scalping by identifying demand zones on lower timeframes, while suggesting $24 as an advantageous entry point for longer-term positions. Jacob Canfield, another seasoned trader, highlighted Chainlink's successful retest of its impulse breakout base, breaking local resistance, and anticipates this as the commencement of an uptrend in the market.

news.headline: Meeting of UAB Orkela bondholders set for 9 Jan 2025 at 10 AM in Vilnius, ISIN code LT0000405961. Trustee: UAB AUDIFINA.
news.summary: On 11th December 2024, a notice was issued regarding a meeting of bondholders of UAB “Orkela” (code 304099538) at Jogailos st. 4, Vilnius, Lithuania, regarding their bond issue with ISIN code LT0000405961. The meeting is set for 9th January 2025 at 10 AM Vilnius time. The trustee of the bondholders, UAB "AUDIFINA" (code 125921757) at A. Juozapavičiaus st. 6, Vilnius, Lithuania, has provided further details about the upcoming Meeting.

news.headline: Ethereum's price surge could reach $5,000 in December post cup-and-handle breakout.
news.summary: The price of Ether is projected to potentially increase towards $5,000 in December following a breakout from its cup-and-handle chart pattern.

news.headline: Global Cutaneous T-Cell Lymphoma diagnosis market to reach US$425.8 million by 2034, growing at 5.2% CAGR with significant advancements in diagnostic methodologies, highlighting AI, digital pathology, and liquid biopsy. North America to hold 4% market share by 2034, with key players such as Mayo Clinic, MD Anderson Cancer Center, and more leading the market. Rapid growth expected in demand for blood tests and imaging tests.
news.summary: The global Cutaneous T-cell lymphoma (CTCL) diagnosis market is expected to reach US$ 256.5 million in 2024, with a projected CAGR of 5.2% from 2024 to 2034, reaching a valuation of US$ 425.8 million. Key developments in methodologies such as next-generation sequencing and PCR have improved CTCL diagnosis accuracy. Immunophenotyping and immunohistochemistry help distinguish CTCL from other disorders. Liquid biopsy and AI technologies are being explored for early detection and monitoring. The market players include Mayo Clinic, MD Anderson Cancer Center, and others. North America is estimated to hold a 4% market share by 2034. Blood and imaging tests are expected to see rapid growth in this market.

news.headline: Papa Johns to host analyst and investor meeting today at 10:00 am ET. Check the IR website for live webcast.
news.summary: Papa Johns International, Inc. is set to hold an analyst and investor meeting on December 12, 2024, at 10:00 am ET. Those interested in attending can access the live video webcast of the event on the Papa Johns Investor Relations site. Registrations should be completed online at https://ir.papajohns.com/news-events/ir-calendar at least 15 minutes before the event's commencement. The meeting is scheduled to provide important insights and updates about the company and its financial performance. Participants are encouraged to tune in for valuable information regarding Papa Johns©.

news.headline: Jeff Bezos' wealth surpassed all Bitcoins combined in July 2020, reaching $171 billion, exceeding Bitcoin's total value of $170 billion.
news.summary: Tech giant Amazon's founder, Jeff Bezos, has accumulated substantial wealth over the years, with his personal fortune reaching staggering figures. In July 2020, Bezos' wealth peaked at $171 billion, surpassing the total value of all Bitcoins in circulation, which stood at approximately $170 billion, as reported by Bloomberg. Despite Bitcoin being the leading cryptocurrency in terms of market capitalization, this marked an exceptional milestone for Bezos. Nevertheless, this would be the final instance where Bezos exceeded Bitcoin's value.

news.headline: Conduit Pharmaceuticals aims to transform drug development by utilizing Artificial Intelligence and Cybernetics.
news.summary: Conduit Pharmaceuticals is set to transform drug development through a groundbreaking agreement that will leverage artificial intelligence (AI) and cybernetics. This innovative approach aims to streamline processes and enhance efficiency in creating new medications. The agreement involves a significant investment of $50 million towards integrating AI and cybernetics into drug development. The company is confident that this partnership will revolutionize the pharmaceutical industry by accelerating the production of life-saving drugs and improving overall healthcare outcomes.

news.headline: Good Supply Cannabis is introducing new products in their portfolio, including infused pre-rolls and vapes for the holidays.
news.summary: Good Supply Cannabis has recently announced new additions to its product lineup, including extensions to its popular infused pre-rolls and vape products. The company is expanding its portfolio to offer customers a wider range of options. This move comes as Good Supply Cannabis continues to see growth in the market, with their products garnering increasing popularity. Stay updated on the latest developments from Good Supply Cannabis as they further strengthen their position in the industry.

news.headline: Gaxos Labs merges with Recraft AI, enhancing AI solutions for gaming developers. Dec 12, 2024 in Roseland, NJ. #AIintegration #GaxosLabs
news.summary: In Roseland, New Jersey on December 12, 2024, Gaxos.ai Inc. disclosed that they have incorporated Recraft AI into their artificial intelligence offering, Gaxos Labs. Gaxos, a firm specializing in AI developments in different industries, confirmed the latest integration of Recraft AI, designed for game developers and publishers.

news.headline: Knight Therapeutics receives regulatory approval for TAVALISSE® in Mexico for treating ITP patients; key: fostamatinib disodium hexahydrate, COFEPRIS.
news.summary: In Montreal on December 12, 2024, Knight Therapeutics Inc. (TSX: GUD), a pan-American (excluding USA) specialty pharmaceutical company, disclosed that its Mexican affiliate, Grupo Biotoscana de Especialidad S.A. de C.V., has been granted regulatory clearance by COFEPRIS for TAVALISSE® (fostamatinib disodium hexahydrate) to address thrombocytopenia in adult patients with chronic immune thrombocytopenia (ITP) who did not adequately respond to prior treatment.

news.headline: Safety Shot expects 50% revenue growth in Q4 2024 driven by product rebranding, strategic alliances, and security sales.
news.summary: JUPITER, Florida, on December 12, 2024 -- Safety Shot, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHOT) announced an expected revenue growth surge of over 50% in Q4 2024 compared to Q3 2024. The surge is attributed to factors such as the successful rebranding of their primary product, Sure Shot, resulting in significant market share gains. Additionally, strategic partnerships with retailers have expanded the Company's national presence. The strategic sale of securities has provided vital capital for future growth. Safety Shot views these projected results as validation of their effective strategy and operational execution.

news.headline: SRM Entertainment (Nasdaq: SRM) reorders Sip With Me cups from Abu Dhabi and develops exclusive products for a Las Vegas horror attraction, continuing growth trajectory.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, based in Jupiter, FL, SRM Entertainment, Inc. (Nasdaq: SRM) shared impactful news. The renowned provider of licensed merchandise and souvenirs revealed a notable reorder for its Sip With Me cups from a top marine life theme park in Abu Dhabi. Moreover, SRM is crafting exclusive items for a pioneering year-round horror attraction in Las Vegas. These moves signify SRM's progress and deliberate move towards diversifying into different markets and product types, embodying its strong growth strategy.

news.headline: ZenaTech launches Quantum Computing project "Sky Traffic" with ZenaDrone 1000 drones for traffic optimization, weather forecasting.
news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a tech company listed on Nasdaq (ZENA) and FSE (49Q), based in Toronto, revealed on December 12, 2024, the initiation of a Quantum Computing initiative known as Sky Traffic. Specializing in AI drone solutions, Drone-as-a-Service (DaaS), and enterprise SaaS solutions, ZenaTech will employ ZenaDrone 1000 drones for monitoring vehicle traffic. The project aims to optimize traffic flow and enhance weather forecasting capabilities. This endeavor was prompted by interest from a governmental entity in utilizing the company's drone technology for traffic surveillance.

news.headline: Repligen published its 2023 Corporate Sustainability Report focusing on six key impact areas. Includes reports aligned with 4 frameworks.
news.summary: Repligen Corporation, a leading life sciences company (NASDAQ:RGEN) based in Waltham, Mass., has released its 2023 Corporate Sustainability Report digitally. The report, titled “Advancing Impacts”, highlights the company’s progress in six key impact areas: Products & Packaging, Operations, Talent, Supply Chain, Communities, and Partnerships & Pathways. Along with this, the report includes detailed disclosures following four major reporting frameworks: Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) Standards, Sustainability Accounting Standards Board (SASB), United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (UN SDGs), and Task Force on Climate-Related Disclosures (TCFD). The publication was made on Dec. 12, 2024, emphasizing the company's commitment to sustainable strategies.

news.headline: Exro's Cellex Division installs first Cell Driver™ Energy Storage System at Red Deer Polytechnic. (Characters: 100)
news.summary: Exro Technologies Inc., a prominent clean-technology company, revealed on Dec. 12, 2024, that they are listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: EXRO) and the OTCQB market (OTCQB: EXROF). The company specializes in innovative power control electronics for electric motors and batteries to enhance their efficiency.

news.headline: Scottie Resources discovers new gold zone grading 6.85 g/t over 5.85m and intercepts 37.6 g/t gold over 4.1m in BC.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 12, 2024, Scottie Resources Corp. (referred to as "Scottie" or the "Company") shared positive updates on their recent drilling activities at the Scottie Gold Mine (SGM). The company disclosed fresh assay results from the 2024 drilling program and announced the identification of a previously unknown zone situated to the south of the current mine site. Scottie Resources Corp. operates under the tickers TSXV: SCOT, OTCQB: SCTSF, and FSE: SR8.

news.headline: Concordia University's Volt-Age offers 250 fully funded PhD opps in electrification research with $123M funding.
news.summary: A program at Concordia University named Volt-Age has achieved a significant milestone by offering 250 fully funded PhD positions focusing on electrification research. Volt-Age, recognized as Canada's largest electrification research initiative, has secured over $123 million in funding from the Canada First Research Excellence Fund (CFREF). The program's primary objective is to drive advancements in decarbonizing the energy sector through innovative research efforts.

news.headline: b.well Connected Health appoints Sara Zywicki as Chief Product Officer to lead strategy and execution.
news.summary: Sara Zywicki has recently been appointed as the Chief Product Officer at b.well Connected Health, a prominent platform offering integrated consumer health solutions. The company revealed this news on December 12, 2024. Zywicki's primary responsibilities will involve spearheading the planning and implementation of b.well's initiatives.

news.headline: Allegiant Travel Company's November 2024 traffic exceeds expectations, with strong booking trends post-election.
news.summary: Allegiant Travel Company (NASDAQ: ALGT) has released its preliminary passenger traffic results for November 2024 in Las Vegas. Drew Wells, the Chief Commercial Officer, mentioned that post-election booking trends have exceeded their initial projections. The company reported a notable increase in passenger traffic during this period.

news.headline: Elevation Oncology partners with Synaffix through licensing agreement for ADC technology, including development of novel HER3 ADC candidate EO-1022.
news.summary: Elevation Oncology has secured a licensing agreement to utilize Synaffix's ADC technology for a single program, along with SYNstatin E™. Within this collaboration, Elevation Oncology has put forward a new HER3 ADC candidate named EO-1022. The candidate will make use of both Elevation Oncology's antibody and Synaffix's exclusive ADC development technologies. This partnership agreement facilitates the advancement of EO-1022 in the field of oncology, potentially leading to significant developments in this area.

news.headline: Elevation Oncology nominates EO-1022, a HER3 ADC for treating solid tumors; utilizes seribantumab with MMAE and Synaffix's GlycoConnect® and HydraSpace® ADC technologies.
news.summary: EO-1022 consists of seribantumab, an anti-HER3 monoclonal antibody paired with an MMAE payload. The drug benefits from a new global license agreement with Synaffix, utilizing their GlycoConnect® and HydraSpace® ADC technologies for specific glycan conjugation.

news.headline: Medicus Pharma's D-MNA patch gets FDA's MUMS designation for SCC in horses. Product development plan submission in process.
news.summary: The company is set to present a product development plan aimed at treating External Squamous Cell Carcinoma (SCC) in horses. This plan will outline strategies for developing a treatment specifically designed for this condition. Squamous Cell Carcinoma is a common type of skin cancer that can affect horses, with External SCC primarily affecting the skin surface. The proposed plan is expected to address the unique requirements for tackling SCC in horses, with a focus on efficacy and safety. The company's initiative marks a significant step towards providing a specialized solution for this specific type of cancer in equine animals.

news.headline: Mega View Digital Entertainment Corp. will not send proxy materials for its Jan 3 meeting due to Canadian Postal Strike.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 12, 2024, Mega View Digital Entertainment Corp. (NEX: MVD.H) announced that they will use the CSA Coordinated Blanket Order 51-931 to avoid sending proxy-related materials for their upcoming annual general and special meeting scheduled for January 3, 2024. This decision is a result of the current nationwide strike by the Canadian Union of Postal Workers, which began on November 15, 2024, causing delays and suspension of mail services in Canada. Mega View has met all conditions and is utilizing the exemption provided in the Order for sending proxy-related materials.

news.headline: Conagra Brands to pay quarterly dividend of $0.35 per share of CAG stock on Feb 27, 2025, for stockholders as of Jan.
news.summary: Chicago-based Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG) revealed today that the company's Board of Directors has given the green light to a quarterly dividend of $0.35 per share for holders of CAG common stock. The payout date is set for February 27, 2025, and shareholders as of the end of business on January (specific date not provided) will be eligible for this dividend.

news.headline: Chronograph integrates Carta Capitalization Tables for mutual clients; enables automatic data exchange, improving efficiency.
news.summary: Chronograph and Carta's mutual clients will now enjoy the convenience of automatic data exchange, with Carta cap table information seamlessly integrated into Chronograph for General Partners platform. This partnership, announced on December 12, 2024 in New York, will enhance the experience of users by providing streamlined access to crucial data. This collaboration will impact a significant number of clients, with both companies being key players in the industry. The merger allows for more efficient monitoring of portfolios, ultimately benefiting investors and stakeholders alike.

news.headline: Monterey County DA's Office selects NICE Justice for digital evidence management - 4th in California to do so.
news.summary: NICE, a publicly-traded company on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol NICE, recently revealed that the Monterey County District Attorney’s Office in California has opted for NICE Justice, an artificial intelligence-driven tool within the Evidencentral platform. This choice aligns with their objective of consolidating digital evidence management and streamlining the process. Being the fourth prosecutorial office in California to embrace this transformation, the move reflects a growing trend towards leveraging technology for efficient evidence handling.

news.headline: AstroNova's Q3 FY2025: Net revenue $40.4M, GAAP gross margin 33.9%, non-GAAP gross margin 34.0%, net income $0.03 per share.
news.summary: AstroNova, a leading company in data visualization technologies, has reported its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025. The quarter, ending on November 2, 2024, saw the company achieve a net revenue of $40.4 million. The GAAP gross margin stood at 33.9%, while the non-GAAP gross margin was slightly higher at 34.0%. Furthermore, the GAAP operating margin was at 3.1%, with the non-GAAP operating margin reaching 4.0%. The company reported a GAAP net income of $0.03 per diluted share, while the non-GAAP net income was $0.06 per diluted share.

news.headline: Keepit is named leader in 2024 SPARK Matrix™ for Cloud Data Protection for SaaS by QKS Group, recognizing its excellence.
news.summary: The QKS Group recently released their SPARK Matrix™ report, offering a competitive analysis and ranking of top Software Engineering Intelligence Platform vendors. Keepit emerged as a prominent leader in the 2024 SPARK Matrix™ for Cloud Data Protection for SaaS Applications due to its outstanding performance in delivering comprehensive solutions.

news.headline: Trump to Time: We will use Ukraine support as leverage vs Russia.
